visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen introduction. On the left, a woman with blonde hair in a maroon sweatshirt prepares green onions. On the right, the main character, a woman with dark hair wearing a white textured knit hat and a pink shirt, is eating. The setting is a brightly lit indoor room with colorful posters and a desk. (2) The main character holds up a large bundle of fresh green onions wrapped in plastic. She proceeds to cut the roots on a wooden cutting board and washes the stalks under a tap. (3) She opens several small square packages of Kiri cream cheese and places them into a clear glass bowl. She then squeezes a packet of honey over the cheese and stirs the mixture vigorously with a fork until it reaches a smooth, creamy consistency. (4) The woman takes a bag of Lay's chips and crushes them by hand while they are still in the bag. She then introduces a red package of dried meat paper, cutting the thin sheets into small pieces with scissors into a tray containing the crushed chips. (5) Using a small spoon, she thickens the white stem of a green onion with the prepared cream cheese. She then rolls and dips the coated onion into the mixture of crushed chips and meat paper until it is fully covered. (6) She takes a large, crunchy bite of the onion. Initially, she smiles and gives a thumbs up, but as she continues chewing, her expression shifts to one of surprise and discomfort from the onion's pungency, fanning her mouth and reacting to the heat.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 美國流行生吃「大蔥」？. [Logo]: @anna.antonje. (2) [Slogan]: 美國爆紅大蔥沙拉？！. [Variety]: 奶酪生大蔥. (3) [Subtitle]: 還配奶油奶酪？. (4) [Subtitle]: 先準備大蔥！. (5) [Subtitle]: 切根後洗一洗！. (6) [Subtitle]: 要製作Cream起司醬！. (7) [Subtitle]: + 加蜂蜜. (8) [Subtitle]: 好好攪拌一下. (9) [Variety]: 起司醬完成. (10) [Subtitle]: 準備一個餅乾. (11) [Subtitle]: 打碎一下！. (12) [Variety]: 還沒結束. (13) [Subtitle]: 這是我的最愛吃的肉紙. (14) [Subtitle]: 這個是台北第一名！！！. (15) [Subtitle]: 把肉紙切碎. (16) [Variety]: (集中). (17) [Variety]: (很像拐杖什麼的). (18) [Variety]: 沾一下~. (19) [Subtitle]: Cream起司中和掉大蔥的辣味，好好吃喔. (20) [Variety]: 巨好吃. (21) [Subtitle]: (再配肉紙的話絕了!!!!). (22) [Subtitle]: 過年跟家人一起的時候要不要吃看看？. (23) [Variety]: 好好吃. (24) [Subtitle]: 感覺在吃歐美的開胃菜(?). (25) [Subtitle]: 但有一個要注意的...!. (26) [Variety]: 後面爆辣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character in pink; 1 female character appearing in the initial comparison clip on the left.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a young East Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a distinctive white chunky-knit hat and a vibrant pink long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home studio setup featuring a white desk, a gaming-style chair, and walls decorated with colorful art posters (including one that says 'HAPPINESS IS HAPPENING'). Lighting equipment is visible via the reflection in her eyes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A rhythmic electronic pop track starts immediately with a steady four-on-the-floor beat. A female narrator speaks with high energy and a bright, welcoming tone, introducing the viral food trend. (2) As the video cuts to ingredient prep, sharp 'plastic crinkling' SFX are heard when she handles the onion bag and cheese wrappers. The narrator's speed increases, maintaining clarity. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect highlights the addition of honey. The BGM remains the primary layer, with the percussive elements of the music driving the pace. (4) Loud, exaggerated 'crunch' and 'crush' SFX are layered in as the chips are squeezed and the meat paper is cut. These sounds are crisp and high-frequency. (5) The final segment features a prominent, wet 'crunching' sound when the woman bites into the onion. The narrator's voice shifts into a higher, more strained register to express the sudden realization of the onion's spiciness, concluding the audio track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Preparation -> Assembly -> Tasting -> Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to test and review a viral food trend from the US—eating large raw green onions dipped in cream cheese and crushed snacks. It provides a quick step-by-step tutorial on the preparation while focusing on the creator's authentic and humorous reaction to the taste and spice level.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display and use of Kiri cream cheese and Jiang Ji Hua Long meat paper, with specific praise for the meat paper brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high density of variety-show style text and sound effects to maintain high viewer engagement. The contrast between the initial 'delicious' expectation and the final 'spicy' reality provides a comedic arc.
